ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., ACC, ACC+T) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the sleep stage (e.g., Wake, Light, Deep, REM) */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the sleep stage */,
  "stage_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the sleep stage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep stage */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model for the sleep stage */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model for the sleep stage */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model for the sleep stage */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model for the sleep stage */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve (AUC) of the model for the sleep stage */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES sleep_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "accuracy_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the accuracy */,
  "sensitivity_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the sensitivity */,
  "specificity_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the specificity */,
  "f1_score_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the F1 score */,
  "auc_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the AUC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_intervals_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "doc_file" TEXT /* File path to the documentation file */,
  "doc_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_documentation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep stage */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES sleep_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep stage being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES sleep_stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "model1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first model being compared */,
  "model2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second model being compared */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sleep stage being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., better, worse, same) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model1_id FOREIGN KEY ("model1_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model2_id FOREIGN KEY ("model2_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES sleep_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead, member, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
